最后是希望作者赶紧更，有点不够看[爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724739532,"group_id":"7336028498064067608","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"越过高山就能看到海…","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzaYXNRM5HmRShzbf8EhqmY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f5da1a3d2432436fa07e9a6a5daa6ac7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776620311&x-signature=%2FWN2GU1NKzrsypgt9b7tZUVhaZY%3D","user_id":"923186451723784","user_name":"挽君歌"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"923186451723784","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7336028498064067608","book_info":{"abstract":"高考后，林楚意外获得了愉悦人生系统。

从此，手握泼天富贵，身旁美女如云。
